headline: Church & Dwight (CHD) Delivers Impressive Quarter, Says RBC Capital
summary: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) is included among the 10 Best Inflation-Hedge Stocks to Buy for 2026. On May 4, RBC Capital raised its price recommendation on Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) to $114 from $112. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm said the company delivered an impressive quarter, […]
